message:
chore(fastapi): fix Clippy lints and update dependencies

proptest.rs changes:
- Add #![allow(clippy::cast_lossless)] for boundary value testing
  The explicit `as` casts are intentional for testing type boundaries,
  not accidental lossy conversions
- Replace |n| n.to_string() with std::string::ToString::to_string
  Uses fully qualified method syntax per Clippy recommendation

Cargo.lock:
- Dependency updates from concurrent development

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
